style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Oddish's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its seam lines, casting sharp blue-white light that fractures into crystalline shards. Metallic dust particles drift in slow motion, catching the light like liquid silver. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
